tool_use_result.originalFile:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Bayes Market API
  description: |
    Prediction market engine with LMSR-based pricing, event-sourced command
    processing, and real-time marginal probability updates.

    ## Authentication

    Write endpoints require an `X-Bayes-Agent-Id` header when the server is
    running with `BAYES_REQUIRE_AGENT_ID=true` (the production default).
    The header value must match the token pattern `[!#$%&'*+\-.^_\`|~0-9A-Za-z]+`.

    ## Rate Limiting

    When `BAYES_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN` is set, responses include standard rate
    limit headers (`X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`,
    `X-RateLimit-Reset`, `X-RateLimit-Policy`). Exceeding the limit returns
    `429` with a `Retry-After` header.

    ## WebSocket Endpoints (not covered here)

    Real-time streaming is available at `/ws/markets/{id}/prices`,
    `/ws/markets/{id}/events`, and `/ws/accounts/{id}/risk`. These are not
    representable in OpenAPI 3.0 and are excluded from this specification.
  version: 1.0.0
  contact:
    name: Bayes Market Engineering

servers:
  - url: http://localhost:3205
    description: Local development server

tags:
  - name: Health
    description: Service health and discovery endpoints
  - name: Markets
    description: Market CRUD, metadata, analytics, events, and comments
  - name: Orders
    description: Trading endpoints (ProbabilityEdit, EventTrade)
  - name: Accounts
    description: Account risk, exposure, positions, and P&L

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Paths
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
paths:

  # ---- Health ----

  /:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Service index
      description: Returns the public HTTP surface listing all available route groups.
      operationId: getServiceIndex
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Service index payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [service, status, routes, meta]
                properties:
                  service:
                    type: string
                    example: bayes-market
                  status:
                    type: string
                    enum: [ok]
                  routes:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      health:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                      markets:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                      orders:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                      accounts:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

  /health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Legacy health check
      description: Returns basic service health. Identical to `/healthz`.
      operationId: getHealth
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Service is healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthResponse"

  /healthz:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Legacy health check (alias)
      description: |
        Kubernetes-style health probe endpoint. Returns the same payload as
        `/health`. Kept for backward compatibility with existing monitoring
        tools.
      operationId: getHealthz
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Service is healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthResponse"

  /v1/health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Versioned health check with component breakdown
      description: |
        Returns detailed health with per-component status for database,
        inference engine, and authentication subsystems. The top-level
        `status` is an aggregate: `ok` when all components are healthy,
        `degraded` when any component is degraded, or `unhealthy` when
        any component is down.
      operationId: getV1Health
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Detailed health payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/V1HealthResponse"

  # ---- Markets (read) ----

  /v1/markets:
    get:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: List markets
      description: |
        Returns the market collection with optional filtering by status,
        sorting, and title search. Resolved markets are excluded by default
        unless `include_resolved=true` or `status=resolved` or `status=all`.
      operationId: listMarkets
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          description: Filter by market status.
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [active, resolved, closed, draft, all]
        - name: sort
          in: query
          description: Sort order for the results.
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [volume, liquidity, created]
        - name: q
          in: query
          description: Case-insensitive title substring search.
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: include_resolved
          in: query
          description: Include resolved markets in results.
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: false
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Market list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [markets, count, meta]
                properties:
                  markets:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketSummary"
                  count:
                    type: integer
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"

    post:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Create a market
      operationId: createMarket
      security:
        - AgentId: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateMarketRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Market created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [market, event, meta]
                properties:
                  market:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Market"
                  event:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Event"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "409":
          description: Market with this title already exists
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
        "429":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RateLimited"

  /v1/markets/{marketId}:
    get:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Get market detail
      operationId: getMarket
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
        - name: context
          in: query
          description: |
            Condition assignments for conditional probability queries.
            Each value has the format `variableId:outcomeId`.
          schema:
            type: array
            items:
              type: string
          style: form
          explode: true
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Full market payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [market, meta]
                properties:
                  market:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Market"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/meta:
    get:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Get market preview metadata
      description: Returns Open Graph and share-preview metadata for the market.
      operationId: getMarketPreview
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Market preview payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [preview, meta]
                properties:
                  preview:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketPreview"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/engine-stats:
    get:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Get engine diagnostics
      description: |
        Returns inference engine diagnostics for the market including timing
        statistics, cache hit rates, and junction tree compilation details.
      operationId: getMarketEngineStats
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Engine stats payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/EngineStatsResponse"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/analytics:
    get:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Get market analytics
      description: |
        Returns aggregated analytics for a market: total volume, trade count,
        time-bucketed price history, and top traders.
      operationId: getMarketAnalytics
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
        - name: interval
          in: query
          description: Time bucket interval for price history.
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: ["1h", "6h", "1d", "7d"]
            default: "1h"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Analytics payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AnalyticsResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/events:
    get:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Get market event journal
      description: Returns the paginated event-sourced journal for a market.
      operationId: getMarketEvents
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/FromSeq"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/Limit"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paginated event list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [marketId, events, chain, pagination, meta]
                properties:
                  marketId:
                    type: string
                  events:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/Event"
                  chain:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/ChainState"
                  pagination:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/SeqPagination"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/comments:
    get:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Get market comments
      description: Returns the paginated discussion thread for a market.
      operationId: getMarketComments
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/FromSeq"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/Limit"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paginated comment list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [marketId, comments, pagination, meta]
                properties:
                  marketId:
                    type: string
                  comments:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/Comment"
                  pagination:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/SeqPagination"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

    post:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Post a comment
      operationId: postComment
      security:
        - AgentId: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/PostCommentRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Comment accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [comment, meta]
                properties:
                  comment:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Comment"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"
        "409":
          description: Market not active or idempotency conflict
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
        "429":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RateLimited"

  # ---- Markets (write) ----

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/resolve:
    post:
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Resolve a market
      description: |
        Resolves a market by setting a winning outcome or explicit final
        probability distribution. Only active or closed markets can be
        resolved. Provide either `outcomeId` for a binary resolution or
        `finalProbabilities` for a custom distribution.
      operationId: resolveMarket
      security:
        - AgentId: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResolveMarketRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Market resolved
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [market, result, meta]
                properties:
                  market:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Market"
                  result:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/TerminalResult"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/CommandResponseMeta"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"
        "409":
          description: Market already resolved, not resolvable, or idempotency conflict
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
        "429":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RateLimited"

  # ---- Orders ----

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/orders/probability-edit:
    post:
      tags: [Orders]
      summary: Submit a probability edit
      description: |
        Moves a market's marginal probability for one outcome to a target
        value using the LMSR pricing engine. The server materializes a
        canonical `bayes-command/v1` envelope from the thin REST body.

        Accepted edits return `201`. Solvency failures (the edit would
        drive state-contingent assets negative) return `409` with code
        `min_asset_violation` per the t586 contract freeze.
      operationId: probabilityEdit
      security:
        - AgentId: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProbabilityEditRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Edit accepted and filled
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProbabilityEditResponse"
        "400":
          description: Validation failure (missing fields, bad probability, etc.)
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"
        "409":
          description: |
            Solvency violation (`min_asset_violation`), market not active,
            or idempotency conflict.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CommandRejectedResponse"
        "429":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RateLimited"

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/orders/event-trade:
    post:
      tags: [Orders]
      summary: Submit an event trade
      description: |
        Places an event-formula trade on a market using CNF formula syntax.
        Buys or sells shares of an event defined by a conjunction of
        outcome assignments.
      operationId: eventTrade
      security:
        - AgentId: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/EventTradeRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Trade accepted and filled
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/EventTradeResponse"
        "400":
          description: Validation failure (bad formula, invalid size, etc.)
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"
        "409":
          description: |
            Solvency violation, market not active, position limit exceeded,
            or idempotency conflict.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CommandRejectedResponse"
        "429":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RateLimited"
        "501":
          description: Complex formula inference not yet supported
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

  # ---- Accounts ----

  /v1/accounts/{accountId}/risk:
    get:
      tags: [Accounts]
      summary: Get account risk
      description: |
        Returns the risk state for one account including per-market minimum
        asset values, capacity indicators, and utilization metrics.
      operationId: getAccountRisk
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/AccountId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Account risk payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [account, meta]
                properties:
                  account:
                    type: object
                    required: [id, risk]
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                      risk:
                        $ref: "#/components/schemas/AccountRisk"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/accounts/{accountId}/exposure:
    get:
      tags: [Accounts]
      summary: Get account exposure
      description: |
        Returns the current live EventTrade exposure for one account. An
        account that has no open positions returns `404`.
      operationId: getAccountExposure
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/AccountId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Account exposure payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [account, meta]
                properties:
                  account:
                    type: object
                    required: [id, exposure]
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                      exposure:
                        $ref: "#/components/schemas/AccountExposure"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/accounts/{accountId}/positions:
    get:
      tags: [Accounts]
      summary: Get account positions
      description: |
        Returns the current open positions for one account. Returns `404`
        if the account has no live positions.
      operationId: getAccountPositions
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/AccountId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Account positions payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [account, meta]
                properties:
                  account:
                    type: object
                    required: [id, positions]
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                      positions:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Position"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/accounts/{accountId}/pnl:
    get:
      tags: [Accounts]
      summary: Get account P&L
      description: |
        Returns aggregate P&L for one account across all markets with
        per-market and per-outcome breakdowns.
      operationId: getAccountPnl
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/AccountId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Account P&L payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [pnl, meta]
                properties:
                  pnl:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/AccountPnl"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/markets/{marketId}/accounts/{accountId}/pnl:
    get:
      tags: [Accounts]
      summary: Get market-scoped account P&L
      description: |
        Returns P&L for one account in one specific market with per-outcome
        breakdown.
      operationId: getMarketAccountPnl
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/MarketId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/AccountId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Market-scoped P&L payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [pnl, meta]
                properties:
                  pnl:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketPnl"
                  meta:
                    $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Components
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
components:

  securitySchemes:
    AgentId:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Bayes-Agent-Id
      description: |
        Agent identity token. Required on write endpoints when
        `BAYES_REQUIRE_AGENT_ID=true` (production default). Must match
        `[!#$%&'*+\-.^_\`|~0-9A-Za-z]+`.

  parameters:
    MarketId:
      name: marketId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Market identifier (e.g. `m1`).

    AccountId:
      name: accountId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Account identifier (e.g. `acct_abc`).

    FromSeq:
      name: fromSeq
      in: query
      description: Start reading from this sequence number (inclusive).
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        default: 1

    Limit:
      name: limit
      in: query
      description: Maximum number of records to return.
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 100
        default: 100

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request (malformed JSON, missing fields, bad parameters)
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid `X-Bayes-Agent-Id` header
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
          example:
            error:
              code: missing_agent_id
              message: Missing Bayes agent id header
              details:
                header: X-Bayes-Agent-Id
                category: trade_write
            meta:
              timestamp: "2026-01-15T12:00:00Z"

    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

    RateLimited:
      description: Rate limit exceeded
      headers:
        Retry-After:
          schema:
            type: integer
          description: Seconds until the rate limit window resets.
        X-RateLimit-Limit:
          schema:
            type: integer
        X-RateLimit-Remaining:
          schema:
            type: integer
        X-RateLimit-Reset:
          schema:
            type: integer
          description: Unix timestamp when the window resets.
        X-RateLimit-Policy:
          schema:
            type: string
            example: bayes-rate-limit/v1
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
          example:
            error:
              code: rate_limit_exceeded
              message: Rate limit exceeded for Bayes agent id
              details:
                limit: 60
                windowSeconds: 60
                retryAfterSeconds: 45
                policyVersion: bayes-rate-limit/v1
            meta:
              timestamp: "2026-01-15T12:00:00Z"

  schemas:

    # ---- Core envelopes ----

    Meta:
      type: object
      required: [timestamp]
      properties:
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the response.

    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      required: [error]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code:
              type: string
              description: Machine-readable error code.
              example: invalid_payload
            message:
              type: string
              description: Human-readable error description.
            details:
              type: object
              additionalProperties: true
              description: Additional context about the error.
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    # ---- Health ----

    HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [service, status, timestamp]
      properties:
        service:
          type: string
          example: bayes-market
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok]
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    V1HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [service, status, timestamp, version, uptime_seconds, components]
      properties:
        service:
          type: string
          example: bayes-market
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, unhealthy]
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        version:
          type: string
          description: Engine version string.
        uptime_seconds:
          type: number
          format: double
        components:
          type: object
          required: [db, inference, auth]
          properties:
            db:
              type: object
              required: [status, kind]
              properties:
                status:
                  type: string
                  enum: [ok, degraded, unhealthy]
                kind:
                  type: string
                  example: in_memory
            inference:
              type: object
              required: [status, backend, version]
              properties:
                status:
                  type: string
                  enum: [ok, degraded, unhealthy]
                backend:
                  type: string
                version:
                  type: string
            auth:
              type: object
              required: [status, requires_agent_id]
              properties:
                status:
                  type: string
                  enum: [ok, degraded, unhealthy]
                requires_agent_id:
                  type: boolean

    # ---- Market schemas ----

    Outcome:
      type: object
      required: [id, name]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: "yes"
        name:
          type: string
          example: "Yes"

    MarketSummary:
      type: object
      required: [id, title, status, liquidity, volume, expires_at]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: m1
        title:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, resolved, closed, draft]
        liquidity:
          type: number
          format: double
        volume:
          type: number
          format: double
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Market:
      type: object
      required: [id, title, description, variableId, status, outcomes, marginals, liquidity, volume, created_at, expires_at]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: m1
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        variableId:
          type: string
          description: Canonical variable identifier derived from the title.
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, resolved, closed, draft]
        outcomes:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Outcome"
          minItems: 2
        marginals:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: number
            format: double
          description: Current marginal probability per outcome ID.
        liquidity:
          type: number
          format: double
        volume:
          type: number
          format: double
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        maxPositionSize:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Maximum position size per account per outcome (optional).
        resolution:
          type: string
          description: Winning outcome ID (present only when status is resolved).
        resolutionProbabilities:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: number
            format: double
          description: Final probability distribution (present only when resolved).

    MarketPreview:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, title, description, og_description, url, image, siteName, type, outcomes]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        og_description:
          type: string
          description: Open Graph description with probability summary.
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
        image:
          type: string
          format: uri
        siteName:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
        outcomes:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            required: [id, name, probability]
            properties:
              id:
                type: string
              name:
                type: string
              probability:
                type: number
                format: double

    CreateMarketRequest:
      type: object
      required: [title, outcomes, expires_at]
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
          default: ""
        outcomes:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Outcome"
          minItems: 2
          description: At least two outcomes with unique IDs.
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Must be in the future (ISO 8601).
        liquidity:
          type: number
          format: double
          default: 10000.0
          description: Initial liquidity pool size. Must be positive.
        maxPositionSize:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Optional maximum position size per account per outcome.

    # ---- Comment schemas ----

    Comment:
      type: object
      required: [commentId, marketId, seq, accountId, body, createdAt]
      properties:
        commentId:
          type: string
        marketId:
          type: string
        seq:
          type: integer
          description: Sequence number within the market's comment thread.
        accountId:
          type: string
        body:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    PostCommentRequest:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, body]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        body:
          type: string
          description: Comment text (max 10000 characters).
        idempotencyKey:
          type: string
          description: Optional idempotency key. Must be non-empty when provided.

    # ---- Resolution schemas ----

    ResolveMarketRequest:
      type: object
      required: [accountId]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string
          description: Winning outcome ID for binary resolution.
        finalProbabilities:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: number
            format: double
          description: |
            Custom final probability distribution. Provide either
            `outcomeId` or `finalProbabilities`, not both.
        idempotencyKey:
          type: string

    # ---- Event schemas ----

    Event:
      type: object
      required: [schemaVersion, eventId, marketId, seq, commandId, eventType, emittedAt, payload, prevEventHash, eventHash]
      properties:
        schemaVersion:
          type: string
          example: bayes-event/v1
        eventId:
          type: string
        marketId:
          type: string
        seq:
          type: integer
          description: Monotonic sequence number within the market.
        commandId:
          type: string
        eventType:
          type: string
          enum: [MarketCreated, CommandAccepted, CommandRejected]
        emittedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        approxFlag:
          type: boolean
        payload:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        prevEventHash:
          type: string
        eventHash:
          type: string

    ChainState:
      type: object
      required: [genesisHash, headSeq, headHash]
      properties:
        genesisHash:
          type: string
        headSeq:
          type: integer
        headHash:
          type: string

    SeqPagination:
      type: object
      required: [fromSeq, limit, returned]
      properties:
        fromSeq:
          type: integer
        limit:
          type: integer
        returned:
          type: integer
        nextFromSeq:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Next sequence number for pagination. Null when at the end.

    # ---- Engine stats ----

    EngineStatsResponse:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, engine, cliques, diagnostics, meta]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        engine:
          type: object
          required: [mode, backend, version, precision, compile_id, compile_type, source_state_hash]
          properties:
            mode:
              type: string
            backend:
              type: string
            version:
              type: string
            precision:
              type: string
            compile_id:
              type: string
              nullable: true
            compile_type:
              type: string
              nullable: true
            source_state_hash:
              type: string
              nullable: true
        cliques:
          type: object
          required: [num_cliques, max_clique_size, junction_tree_width, cliques]
          properties:
            num_cliques:
              type: integer
            max_clique_size:
              type: integer
            junction_tree_width:
              type: integer
            cliques:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
        diagnostics:
          type: object
          required: [request_count, error_count, inference, cache]
          properties:
            request_count:
              type: integer
            error_count:
              type: integer
            inference:
              type: object
              required: [count, mean_ms, p50_ms, p95_ms, p99_ms]
              properties:
                count:
                  type: integer
                mean_ms:
                  type: number
                  format: double
                p50_ms:
                  type: number
                  format: double
                p95_ms:
                  type: number
                  format: double
                p99_ms:
                  type: number
                  format: double
            cache:
              type: object
              required: [hits, misses, hit_rate]
              properties:
                hits:
                  type: integer
                misses:
                  type: integer
                hit_rate:
                  type: number
                  format: double
            compile_time_ms:
              type: number
              format: double
            memory_bytes:
              type: integer
            last_updated:
              type: string
              format: date-time
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    # ---- Analytics ----

    AnalyticsResponse:
      type: object
      required: [market_id, total_volume, trade_count, price_history, top_traders, interval, meta]
      properties:
        market_id:
          type: string
        total_volume:
          type: number
          format: double
        trade_count:
          type: integer
        price_history:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            required: [timestamp, marginals]
            properties:
              timestamp:
                type: string
                format: date-time
              marginals:
                type: object
                additionalProperties:
                  type: number
                  format: double
        top_traders:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            required: [account_id, volume, trade_count]
            properties:
              account_id:
                type: string
              volume:
                type: number
                format: double
              trade_count:
                type: integer
        interval:
          type: string
          enum: ["1h", "6h", "1d", "7d"]
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    # ---- Order schemas ----

    ProbabilityTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind, outcomeId, probability]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [marginal]
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        probability:
          type: number
          format: double
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1

    ContextCondition:
      type: object
      required: [variableId, outcomeId]
      properties:
        variableId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string

    ProbabilityEditRequest:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, variableId, target]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        idempotencyKey:
          type: string
          description: Optional client-supplied deduplication key.
        variableId:
          type: string
          description: Must match the market's canonical variable ID.
        target:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProbabilityTarget"
        context:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ContextCondition"
          default: []
          description: Conditioning context for conditional probability edits.

    ProbabilityEditResponse:
      type: object
      required: [order, result, meta]
      properties:
        order:
          type: object
          required: [id, type, marketId, accountId, status, payload, previousMarginals, newMarginals, impactScore, commandId, submittedAt, createdAt, filledAt]
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
              example: ord_01J...
            type:
              type: string
              enum: [ProbabilityEdit]
            marketId:
              type: string
            accountId:
              type: string
            status:
              type: string
              enum: [filled]
            payload:
              type: object
              additionalProperties: true
            previousMarginals:
              type: object
              additionalProperties:
                type: number
                format: double
              description: Marginal probabilities before the edit.
            newMarginals:
              type: object
              additionalProperties:
                type: number
                format: double
              description: Marginal probabilities after the edit.
            impactScore:
              type: number
              format: double
              description: Cost of the edit in the liquidity pool.
            commandId:
              type: string
            submittedAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            createdAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            filledAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            idempotencyKey:
              type: string
              nullable: true
        result:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/TerminalResult"
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CommandResponseMeta"

    FormulaLiteral:
      type: object
      required: [variableId, outcomeId, negated]
      properties:
        variableId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        negated:
          type: boolean

    EventTradeRequest:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, formula, size, side]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        idempotencyKey:
          type: string
        formula:
          type: array
          items:
            type: array
            items:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/FormulaLiteral"
          description: |
            CNF (conjunctive normal form) formula. Each inner array is a
            clause (disjunction of literals). Max 16 clauses, max 8 literals
            per clause.
          maxItems: 16
        size:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Number of shares to trade. Must be positive.
        side:
          type: string
          enum: [buy, sell]

    EventTradeResponse:
      type: object
      required: [order, result, meta]
      properties:
        order:
          type: object
          required: [id, type, marketId, accountId, status, payload, notional, price, side, size, commandId, submittedAt, createdAt, filledAt]
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
              example: ord_01J...
            type:
              type: string
              enum: [EventTrade]
            marketId:
              type: string
            accountId:
              type: string
            status:
              type: string
              enum: [filled]
            payload:
              type: object
              additionalProperties: true
            notional:
              type: number
              format: double
              description: Total notional value of the trade.
            price:
              type: number
              format: double
              description: Effective price per share.
            side:
              type: string
              enum: [buy, sell]
            size:
              type: number
              format: double
            commandId:
              type: string
            submittedAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            createdAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            filledAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            idempotencyKey:
              type: string
              nullable: true
        result:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/TerminalResult"
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CommandResponseMeta"

    TerminalResult:
      type: object
      description: |
        Terminal outcome block returned by command endpoints. Present on
        both accepted and rejected terminal responses.
      required: [terminal, status, eventType, eventId, commandId, emittedAt]
      properties:
        terminal:
          type: boolean
          enum: [true]
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, rejected]
        eventType:
          type: string
          enum: [CommandAccepted, CommandRejected]
        eventId:
          type: string
        commandId:
          type: string
        emittedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        reasonCode:
          type: string
          description: Present on rejected results.
        reason:
          type: string
          description: Human-readable rejection reason. Present on rejected results.
        retryHint:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Hint for retrying the command. Present on rejected results.

    CommandResponseMeta:
      description: |
        Extended response metadata returned by idempotent command endpoints.
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"
        - type: object
          properties:
            idempotencyKeyEcho:
              type: string
              description: Echo of the client-supplied idempotency key when provided.
            replayed:
              type: boolean
              description: True when this is a replayed idempotent response.

    CommandRejectedResponse:
      type: object
      required: [error, meta]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code:
              type: string
              example: min_asset_violation
            message:
              type: string
              example: Edit would produce negative state-contingent assets
            details:
              type: object
              properties:
                reasonCode:
                  type: string
                reason:
                  type: string
                retryHint:
                  type: string
              additionalProperties: true
        meta:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Meta"

    # ---- Account schemas ----

    AccountRisk:
      type: object
      required: [minAssets, capacityIndicators, updatedAt]
      properties:
        minAssets:
          type: object
          required: [overall, markets]
          properties:
            overall:
              type: number
              format: double
              description: Aggregate minimum asset value across all markets.
            markets:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketRisk"
        capacityIndicators:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CapacityIndicators"
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    MarketRisk:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, minAsset, capacityConsumed, utilization, commandCount, lastOrderId, lastCommandId, updatedAt]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        minAsset:
          type: number
          format: double
        capacityConsumed:
          type: number
          format: double
        utilization:
          type: number
          format: double
        commandCount:
          type: integer
        lastOrderId:
          type: string
        lastCommandId:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CapacityIndicators:
      type: object
      required: [limit, available, consumed, utilization, status]
      properties:
        limit:
          type: number
          format: double
        available:
          type: number
          format: double
        consumed:
          type: number
          format: double
        utilization:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Fraction of capacity consumed (0.0 to 1.0).
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [healthy, constrained, critical, breached]

    AccountExposure:
      type: object
      required: [updatedAt, positions]
      properties:
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        positions:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExposurePosition"

    ExposurePosition:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, outcomeId, netSize, absSize, lastTradePrice, maxPositionSize, updatedAt]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        netSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        absSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        lastTradePrice:
          type: number
          format: double
        maxPositionSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        lastOrderId:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        lastCommandId:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    Position:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, outcomeId, netSize, lastTradePrice]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        netSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        lastTradePrice:
          type: number
          format: double

    AccountPnl:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, markets, summary]
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: string
        markets:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketPnl"
        summary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PnlSummary"

    MarketPnl:
      type: object
      required: [marketId, outcomes, summary]
      properties:
        marketId:
          type: string
        outcomes:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/OutcomePnl"
        summary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PnlSummary"

    OutcomePnl:
      type: object
      required: [outcomeId, netSize, costBasis, currentValue, unrealizedPnl, realizedPnl, totalPnl]
      properties:
        outcomeId:
          type: string
        netSize:
          type: number
          format: double
        costBasis:
          type: number
          format: double
        currentValue:
          type: number
          format: double
        unrealizedPnl:
          type: number
          format: double
        realizedPnl:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalPnl:
          type: number
          format: double

    PnlSummary:
      type: object
      required: [totalCostBasis, totalCurrentValue, totalUnrealizedPnl, totalRealizedPnl, totalPnl]
      properties:
        totalCostBasis:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalCurrentValue:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalUnrealizedPnl:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalRealizedPnl:
          type: number
          format: double
        totalPnl:
          type: number
          format: double

content.text: All `$ref` targets resolve. Let me also verify the YAML structure is valid OpenAPI 3.0.3 and check for consistency.

input.command:
python3 -c "
import yaml

with open('docs/openapi.yaml') as f:
    spec = yaml.safe_load(f)

# Verify OpenAPI version
assert spec['openapi'] == '3.0.3', f'Wrong version: {spec[\"openapi\"]}'

# Verify all required fields exist on schemas that declare them
schemas = spec.get('components', {}).get('schemas', {})
for name, schema in schemas.items():
    required = schema.get('required', [])
    props = schema.get('properties', {})
    if schema.get('type') == 'object' and required and props:
        for r in required:
            if r not in props:
                print(f'ERROR: {name} requires {r} but has no property definition')

# Verify all paths have valid methods
valid_methods = {'get', 'post', 'put', 'delete', 'patch', 'head', 'options'}
for path, methods in spec.get('paths', {}).items():
    for method in methods:
        if method not in valid_methods:
            print(f'WARNING: {path} has unexpected key: {method}')

# Verify new schemas exist
for expected in ['TerminalResult', 'CommandResponseMeta']:
    assert expected in schemas, f'Missing schema: {expected}'
    print(f'Found schema: {expected}')

# Verify old CommandAcceptedResponse is removed
assert 'CommandAcceptedResponse' not in schemas, 'CommandAcceptedResponse should be removed'
print('CommandAcceptedResponse removed: OK')

# Check MarketSummary has expires_at
ms = schemas['MarketSummary']
assert 'expires_at' in ms['properties'], 'Missing expires_at in MarketSummary'
assert 'expires_at' in ms['required'], 'expires_at not in MarketSummary required'
print('MarketSummary.expires_at: OK')

# Check status enums
for name in ['MarketSummary', 'Market']:
    status_enum = schemas[name]['properties']['status']['enum']
    assert 'closed' in status_enum and 'draft' in status_enum, f'{name} status missing closed/draft'
    print(f'{name}.status enum: {status_enum}')

# Check ExposurePosition nullable fields
ep = schemas['ExposurePosition']
assert ep['properties']['lastOrderId'].get('nullable') == True, 'lastOrderId not nullable'
assert ep['properties']['lastCommandId'].get('nullable') == True, 'lastCommandId not nullable'
print('ExposurePosition nullable fields: OK')

# Check ProbabilityEditResponse has result
per = schemas['ProbabilityEditResponse']
assert 'result' in per['required'], 'ProbabilityEditResponse missing result in required'
assert 'result' in per['properties'], 'ProbabilityEditResponse missing result property'
print('ProbabilityEditResponse.result: OK')

# Check EventTradeResponse has result
etr = schemas['EventTradeResponse']
assert 'result' in etr['required'], 'EventTradeResponse missing result in required'
assert 'result' in etr['properties'], 'EventTradeResponse missing result property'
print('EventTradeResponse.result: OK')

print('\\nAll validations passed!')
"

content.text:
All 5 steps complete. Summary of changes to `docs/openapi.yaml`:

**Path fixes:**
- `/v1/markets` GET: status enum expanded to `[active, resolved, closed, draft, all]`
- `/v1/markets/{marketId}/resolve` POST 201: replaced incorrect `CommandAcceptedResponse` (`{event, meta}`) with actual wire format (`{market, result, meta}`)

**Schema fixes:**
- **MarketSummary**: added `expires_at` field; status enum expanded with `closed`, `draft`
- **Market**: status enum expanded with `closed`, `draft`
- **ExposurePosition**: `lastOrderId` and `lastCommandId` marked `nullable: true`
- **ProbabilityEditResponse** & **EventTradeResponse**: added `result` field (`TerminalResult`), meta changed to `CommandResponseMeta`
- **EngineStatsResponse**: clique items given structured schema (`id`, `nodes`, `size`, `states`)

**New schemas added:**
- **TerminalResult**: terminal outcome block with `terminal`, `status`, `eventType`, `eventId`, `commandId`, `emittedAt` + optional rejection fields
- **CommandResponseMeta**: extends Meta with optional `idempotencyKeyEcho` and `replayed`

**Removed:** `CommandAcceptedResponse` (replaced by inline schema + new shared schemas)

Validation: all 127 `$ref` targets resolve, all required fields have matching properties.
